title: Treasure Expansion
description: a mod for Better Than Adventure, which adds new treasure items and more.
body:
**This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3! For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page.**

## Treasure Expansion for Better than Adventure! 

This mod adds new treasure items and other adventure related content to Better than Adventure. Some of these include:

- A diving helmet which allows you to breathe and break blocks quickly underwater
- Piston boots which allow you to leap 3 blocks in the air
- The Alien Gadget which acts as a clock, compass, and calendar in your inventory
- The hellish quiver, which allows you to fire flaming arrows
- A variety of new fruits, that can be found in structures (in addition to apples)
- New types of chest blocks exclusive to structures
- Much more & more coming in future updates

This project tries to stay similar to "vanilla" bta in its content, so if you love BTA! but wish it had more adventure content, Treasure Expansion is for you!
